description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100-1138 CE). Involving Abū l-Baqā' and the late Abū l-Riḍā, who had business dealings in Yemen. Needs further examination. May be related to the T-S NS J11 + T-S 10J4.16 + T-S 16.158 + T-S 10J4.17 cluster.
tags: ib-addenda, Halfon b. Menashshe, India, IB7
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
